title: Enter for the Bergplaas Challenge this weekend
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Bergplaas MTB and...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The Bergplaas MTB and trail run challenge, organised by Chain Gang Events, takes place this Saturday 6 April at Libertas Farm in Hoekwil.

The challenge forms part of the Western Cape XCM league and the Eden XCM league and participants who want to be considered for these leagues, have to ensure that they abide to the distance allocation for the categories.


> Riders who are not part of the league, have to be older than the minimum age for the distance and enter in the open category.


It is also a Cycling South Africa (CSA) sanctioned event and riders must therefore either have a current CSA membership or license – if not, you need to purchase a temporary day license to take part.

Bergplaas offers a 15 km, 30 km, 40 km or 70km cycle challenge or a 7 km or 10 km trail run.

Entries close on Thursday evening, 4 April, at 18:00.

Programme:05:30 - 07:00 - Registration07:30 - Start 70 km07:45 - Start 40 km08:00 - Start 30 km08:15 - Start 15 km08:30 - Trail runs start11:00 - Prize giving

For more information, or to enter, please click here.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
